description: Basejump ships een minimale .env.example. Audit tegen Basejump docs + Supabase docs + Stripe webhook requirements: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (server actions), NEXT_PUBLIC_URL (invitations link), STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Inline comments voor prod vs local dev verschillen. Ook supabase/functions/.env.example checken.
title: Complete .env.example voor Supabase + Stripe (local + prod)
